title: Better With Time: HC Tweaks
description: An add-on for the BWT mod which changes some features to be more "hardcore".
body:
# Better With Time – Tweaked

An add-on that adjusts several mechanics from **Better With Time**.

It changes things so they behave the same way they do in **Better Than Wolves CE**, bringing the gameplay closer to the original design.

## Features

### 🌿 Hemp Adjustments
- Slower growth rate.
- Requires shears to harvest drops.
- Can be broken by piston pushes.
---

### 🔨 Soul Forge Adjustments
- Adds a **Dormant Soul Forge**, naturally generated in Nether Fortresses.
- The Soul Forge craft now requires a **Dormant Soul Forge** + **Nether Star**.
---

### ⚙️ Mechanical & Logic Tweaks
- Slightly increased **Saw** processing speed to match vanilla BTW CE.
- Optional configuration toggles:
  - Restore original Buddy Block neighbor-update behavior.
  - Require strong redstone power for Block Dispensers.
---

You can download **Better With Time** from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-with-time).
